channel.title: OpenSUSE on Just /var/log/
channel.description: Recent content in OpenSUSE on Just /var/log/

item.title: Allow Winbox Discovery
item.description: Secara default winbox di openSUSE tidak menampilkan Neighbors karena terblokir oleh firewall. Kita harus allow manual. sudo firewall-cmd --permanent --service=winbox-discover --add-port=5678/udp sudo firewall-cmd --zone=public --add-service=winbox-discover --permanent sudo firewall-cmd --reload
